# Chris Krough

> Engineering leader and AI transformation consultant with 25+ years of experience. Founder of Backchain, an AI consulting practice. Based in Austin, TX.

## About

Chris Krough is a senior engineering leader with 25 years of experience building and scaling technology organizations. He has guided companies through 3 IPOs and 8 acquisitions, leading platform engineering and technical strategy at Amazon, OJO Labs, Houseful/RBCx, Bazaarvoice, and Rackspace. He founded Backchain to help organizations identify where AI actually works—and build it when it does.

## Services

- [AI Transformation & Implementation](/services): Discovery, prototyping, knowledge systems, LLM evaluation frameworks
- [Platform Engineering](/services): Architecture design, cloud migration, Kubernetes, platform consolidation
- [Due Diligence & Acquisition Readiness](/services): Technical due diligence, post-acquisition integration
- [Engineering Leadership](/services): Fractional/advisory roles, team building, technical strategy

## Projects

- [Retriever](https://github.com/ckrough/retriever): RAG-powered Q&A system with source citations and evaluation framework
- [Drover](https://github.com/ckrough/drover): AI-powered document classification using LLMs
- [Agentspaces](https://github.com/ckrough/agentspaces): Agentic development environment for multi-agent AI workflows
- [Team of Rivals](https://github.com/ckrough/team-of-rivals): Strategic decision-assistance framework as Claude AI Skills
